title: Synthetic api-key leak for dry-run
symptom: Synthetic incident: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY committed to public repo via debug log
incident_overview: Synthetic: a Stripe secret was committed to a public repo via a debug log line; revoke-first path exercised.
resolution: Synthetic: revoked the leaked credential at the issuer, then rotated and re-deployed.
participants: Operator (single founder); systems: synthetic web-platform, Stripe
